notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; traceable source extracts are used when DeepSeek is unavailable.

articles.title: 哈尔滨：构建全域旅游生态圈 游客尽享“最北、最美、最清凉”夏日盛宴
articles.highlight: 哈尔滨将实施十大文旅融合专项行动，构建主客共享的全域旅游生态圈，让游客尽享“最北、最美、最清凉”夏日盛宴。
articles.summary: 哈尔滨市在新闻发布会上宣布，从7月1日至10月8日开展夏季避暑旅游“百日行动”，通过十大文旅融合专项行动构建全域旅游生态圈，擦亮“避暑胜地”名片，吸引国内外游客。这一举措体现了地方政府以旅游业为抓手推动夏季消费和城市品牌建设的积极作为。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该行动展示了地方政府推动旅游业的积极举措，但实际成效需市场检验。
articles.sourceExcerpt: 中新网哈尔滨7月17日电 (记者 刘锡菊)“为擦亮‘避暑胜地’名片，叫响‘夏遇冰城清凉有约’品牌，今天我们向国内外游客发出盛夏邀请。7月1日至10月8日，哈尔滨将实施十大文旅融合专项行动，构建主客共享的全域旅游生态圈，让大家尽享‘最北、最美、最清凉’的夏日盛宴。”17日，在哈尔滨市人民政府新闻办公室召开的哈尔滨夏季避暑旅游“百日行动”新闻发布会上，哈尔滨市文广旅游局副局长杨年福表示。

zh.summary: 哈尔滨市在新闻发布会上宣布，从7月1日至10月8日开展夏季避暑旅游“百日行动”，通过十大文旅融合专项行动构建全域旅游生态圈，擦亮“避暑胜地”名片，吸引国内外游客。这一举措体现了地方政府以旅游业为抓手推动夏季消费和城市品牌建设的积极作为。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该行动展示了地方政府推动旅游业的积极举措，但实际成效需市场检验。

en.highlight: Harbin will implement ten cultural-tourism integration actions to build a host-guest shared all-for-one tourism ecosystem, inviting visitors to enjoy the 'northernmost, most beautiful, and coolest' summer.
en.summary: Harbin announced a summer '100-Day Action' from July 1 to October 8, featuring ten integrated cultural-tourism initiatives to create a shared tourism ecosystem, aiming to boost its reputation as a summer resort and attract domestic and international tourists. This move reflects local government's proactive efforts to promote tourism-driven economic growth and city branding.
en.failureAnalysis: This action demonstrates the local government's proactive measures to boost tourism, but actual effectiveness depends on market reception.
en.title: Harbin Launches Summer '100-Day Action' to Build All-for-One Tourism Ecosystem

articles.title: “创客中国”元宇宙中小企业创新创业大赛在北京启动
articles.highlight: 推动赛事从“项目评选”向“产业培育”、从“阶段性活动”向“持续性生态”转变。
articles.summary: 第十一届“创客中国”元宇宙中小企业创新创业大赛在北京首钢园启动，主题为“元启新探索·智创新宇宙”。该大赛汇聚政府、龙头企业、科研院所和创投机构，旨在推动赛事转型升级，为中小企业搭建更开放、有价值的发展平台。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该赛事聚焦元宇宙领域，为中小企业提供创新生态支持，有望加速技术落地与产业协同。
articles.sourceExcerpt: 中新网北京7月17日电 (记者 陈杭)以“元启新探索·智创新宇宙”为主题的第十一届“创客中国”元宇宙中小企业创新创业大赛启动仪式16日在北京首钢园举行，汇聚政府主管部门、行业龙头企业、科研院所和头部创投机构，推动赛事从“项目评选”向“产业培育”、从“阶段性活动”向“持续性生态”转变，为中小企业创新创业搭建更加开放、更具价值的发展平台。

zh.failureAnalysis: 该赛事聚焦元宇宙领域，为中小企业提供创新生态支持，有望加速技术落地与产业协同。

en.highlight: The competition aims to transform from 'project evaluation' to 'industry cultivation' and from 'periodic event' to 'sustained ecosystem'.
en.summary: The 11th 'Maker China' Metaverse SME Innovation and Entrepreneurship Competition was launched at Shougang Park in Beijing, with the theme 'Meta Initiates New Exploration, Intelligent Innovation Universe'. The event brings together government, leading enterprises, research institutes, and venture capital to drive transformation and provide an open platform for SMEs.
en.failureAnalysis: The competition focuses on the metaverse domain, offering ecological support for SMEs, which may accelerate technology implementation and industry collaboration.
en.title: Metaverse SME Innovation and Entrepreneurship Competition 'Maker China' Launched in Beijing

articles.title: 第十六次全国检察工作会议在京召开 陈文清出席会议并讲话
articles.highlight: 坚持党对检察工作的绝对领导，坚定不移走中国特色社会主义法治道路，坚持司法为民，强化法律监督，维护公平正义。
articles.summary: 第十六次全国检察工作会议于7月16日至17日在北京召开。中共中央政治局委员、中央政法委书记陈文清出席并讲话，强调检察机关要学习贯彻习近平党建思想、法治思想和总体国家安全观，坚持党的领导，强化法律监督，为以中国式现代化推进强国建设提供司法保障。
articles.failureAnalysis: 本次会议是最高层法律工作会议，核心是重申党对检察工作的绝对领导和司法为民方向，无技术性失败分析。
articles.sourceExcerpt: 新华社北京7月17日电 第十六次全国检察工作会议16日至17日在京召开。中共中央政治局委员、中央政法委书记陈文清出席会议并讲话。他强调，全国检察机关要学习贯彻习近平党建思想、习近平法治思想和总体国家安全观，认真贯彻落实习近平总书记关于检察工作的重要指示批示精神，坚持党对检察工作的绝对领导，坚定不移走中国特色社会主义法治道路，坚持司法为民，扭住主责主业，强化法律监督，维护公平正义，为以中国式现代化全面推进强国建设、民族复兴伟业提供有力司法保障。

zh.title: 第十六次全国检察工作会议在京召开 陈文清出席会议并讲话
zh.highlight: 坚持党对检察工作的绝对领导，坚定不移走中国特色社会主义法治道路，坚持司法为民，强化法律监督，维护公平正义。
zh.summary: 第十六次全国检察工作会议于7月16日至17日在北京召开。中共中央政治局委员、中央政法委书记陈文清出席并讲话，强调检察机关要学习贯彻习近平党建思想、法治思想和总体国家安全观，坚持党的领导，强化法律监督，为以中国式现代化推进强国建设提供司法保障。
zh.failureAnalysis: 本次会议是最高层法律工作会议，核心是重申党对检察工作的绝对领导和司法为民方向，无技术性失败分析。

en.highlight: Adhere to the Party's absolute leadership over procuratorial work, unswervingly follow the socialist rule-of-law path with Chinese characteristics, uphold justice for the people, and strengthen legal supervision.
en.summary: The 16th National Procuratorial Work Conference was held in Beijing on July 16-17. Chen Wenqing, member of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Secretary of the Central Political and Legal Affairs Commission, emphasized the need to study and implement Xi Jinping's thoughts on Party building, rule of law, and holistic national security, uphold Party leadership, and strengthen legal supervision to provide judicial guarantees for Chinese modernization.
en.failureAnalysis: This is a high-level legal policy meeting reaffirming Party leadership and people-centered justice; no technical failure analysis is applicable.
en.title: 16th National Procuratorial Work Conference Opens in Beijing; Chen Wenqing Attends and Speaks

articles.title: Why are UK fuel prices rising again?
articles.highlight: 在结束美国-以色列与伊朗战争的和平谈判破裂后，英国燃油价格再次上涨。
articles.summary: 文章指出，由于旨在结束美国-以色列与伊朗战争的和平谈判失败，英国燃油价格出现新一轮上涨。这凸显了地缘政治冲突对能源市场的直接冲击，值得关注后续油价走势。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：和平谈判破裂导致油价攀升，显示国际冲突是影响能源价格的核心因素。
articles.sourceExcerpt: UK fuel prices are going up again after the collapse of peace talks to end the US-Israel war with Iran.

en.highlight: UK fuel prices are going up again after the collapse of peace talks to end the US-Israel war with Iran.
en.summary: The article explains that UK fuel prices have risen again following the failure of peace negotiations aimed at ending the US-Israel conflict with Iran. It highlights how geopolitical tensions directly impact energy markets, making it a relevant read for understanding current oil price dynamics.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: The collapse of peace talks leads to rising fuel prices, underscoring that geopolitical conflicts are a major driver of energy costs.
en.title: Why are UK fuel prices rising again?

articles.title: Trump Media to sell instant access to 'market-moving' social posts
articles.highlight: 特朗普媒体公司正在推出一个快速、付费的信息流，向华尔街交易员提供其最具影响力的帖子。
articles.summary: 文章报道了特朗普媒体公司计划向华尔街交易员出售其社交平台上最具市场影响力帖子的即时访问权限。这一举措旨在将社交媒体的市场影响力变现，值得关注其对金融市场信息传播方式的潜在影响。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该服务可能加剧信息不对称，让付费用户获得先行优势，需关注其合规性与市场公平性。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed to its most influential posts for Wall Street traders.

zh.title: 特朗普媒体公司向华尔街交易员出售‘影响市场’社交帖的即时访问权
zh.highlight: 特朗普媒体公司正在推出一个快速、付费的信息流，向华尔街交易员提供其最具影响力的帖子。
zh.summary: 文章报道了特朗普媒体公司计划向华尔街交易员出售其社交平台上最具市场影响力帖子的即时访问权限。这一举措旨在将社交媒体的市场影响力变现，值得关注其对金融市场信息传播方式的潜在影响。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该服务可能加剧信息不对称，让付费用户获得先行优势，需关注其合规性与市场公平性。

en.highlight: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed to its most influential posts for Wall Street traders.
en.summary: The article reports that Trump Media is planning to sell Wall Street traders instant access to its most market-influential social media posts. This move aims to monetize the market influence of social media and is worth following for its potential impact on how financial information is disseminated.
en.failureAnalysis: This service could exacerbate information asymmetry, giving paying users a first-mover advantage. Its compliance and market fairness need close scrutiny.
en.title: Trump Media to sell instant access to 'market-moving' social posts

articles.title: Quoting Kimi K3
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: No clear evidence
articles.summary: 文章引用Kimi K3在拒绝泄露系统提示后的回应，展示了AI在安全边界内的礼貌交互设计。这反映了AI个性化和用户体验的平衡，值得关注如何在限制下保持友好。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：AI应设计清晰且礼貌的拒绝机制，以维护安全同时不影响用户信任。
articles.highlight: “有什么我能帮忙的吗？”——Kimi K3在拒绝泄露系统提示后反问。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Is there something I can actually help you with today? — Kimi K3 , after refusing to leak its system prompt Tags: kimi , ai-personality , generative-ai , ai , llms

en.highlight: "Is there something I can actually help you with today?" — Kimi K3, after refusing to leak its system prompt.
en.summary: The article quotes Kimi K3's response after declining to reveal its system prompt, showcasing a polite and helpful interaction design within safety boundaries. It highlights the balance between AI personality and user experience.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: AI should implement clear and polite refusal mechanisms to maintain safety without undermining user trust.
en.title: Quoting Kimi K3: AI's Polite Refusal

articles.title: Forward-Future/loopy
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: Loopy 是一个专注 AI 代理循环的实用库，提供可安装的技能来帮助用户发现、调整和设计可重复的代理工作流。该项目在 GitHub 上获得 2737 星，表明社区对其解决实际问题潜力的认可，值得关注其如何简化复杂代理系统的构建。
articles.failureAnalysis: Loopy 可能因过度抽象而难以适应特定业务场景，导致通用性不足；同时，作为开发者工具，需要依赖大量社区贡献和文档完善，若用户学习成本高或缺乏关键集成，可能难以推广。此外，代理循环的稳定性与效率在复杂任务中可能成为瓶颈。
articles.highlight: 一个实用的AI代理循环库，以及一个可安装的技能，用于查找、适应和设计可重复的代理工作流。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 2737 stars and recent public activity. Description: A library of practical AI-agent loops and an installable skill for finding, adapting, and designing repeatable agent workflows.

zh.title: Loopy：实用AI代理循环库与可复用工作流设计技能
zh.highlight: 一个实用的AI代理循环库，以及一个可安装的技能，用于查找、适应和设计可重复的代理工作流。
zh.summary: Loopy 是一个专注 AI 代理循环的实用库，提供可安装的技能来帮助用户发现、调整和设计可重复的代理工作流。该项目在 GitHub 上获得 2737 星，表明社区对其解决实际问题潜力的认可，值得关注其如何简化复杂代理系统的构建。
zh.failureAnalysis: Loopy 可能因过度抽象而难以适应特定业务场景，导致通用性不足；同时，作为开发者工具，需要依赖大量社区贡献和文档完善，若用户学习成本高或缺乏关键集成，可能难以推广。此外，代理循环的稳定性与效率在复杂任务中可能成为瓶颈。

en.highlight: A library of practical AI-agent loops and an installable skill for finding, adapting, and designing repeatable agent workflows.
en.summary: Loopy is a practical library focused on AI-agent loops, offering an installable skill to discover, adapt, and design repeatable agent workflows. With 2737 stars on GitHub, it signals community interest in simplifying complex agent systems.
en.failureAnalysis: The project may suffer from over-generalization, making it hard to fit specific business needs; high learning curve and dependency on community contributions could limit adoption.
en.title: Loopy: A Library of Practical AI-Agent Loops and an Installable Skill for Repeatable Workflows

articles.title: synthetic-sciences/openscience
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 这是一个面向科学研究者的开源AI工作台，旨在通过AI工具简化科研流程。项目在GitHub上获得2544星，表明社区关注度较高，值得了解其如何赋能科学研究。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该项目可能因缺乏可持续的商业模式或社区贡献不足而失败。科学研究对工具的可重复性和准确性要求极高，若工作台无法满足这些严谨需求，将难以被研究机构采纳。此外，竞争激烈（如其他开源AI框架）也可能限制其发展。
articles.highlight: 面向科学研究的开源AI工作台
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 2544 stars and recent public activity. Description: The open-source AI workbench for scientific research

zh.title: 开源科学AI工作台
zh.highlight: 面向科学研究的开源AI工作台
zh.summary: 这是一个面向科学研究者的开源AI工作台，旨在通过AI工具简化科研流程。项目在GitHub上获得2544星，表明社区关注度较高，值得了解其如何赋能科学研究。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该项目可能因缺乏可持续的商业模式或社区贡献不足而失败。科学研究对工具的可重复性和准确性要求极高，若工作台无法满足这些严谨需求，将难以被研究机构采纳。此外，竞争激烈（如其他开源AI框架）也可能限制其发展。

en.highlight: The open-source AI workbench for scientific research
en.summary: This is an open-source AI workbench designed to support scientific research, aiming to streamline research workflows with AI tools. With 2544 stars on GitHub, it has attracted community interest and is worth reading for its potential impact on science.
en.failureAnalysis: Potential failure due to lack of sustainable business model or insufficient community contributions. Scientific research demands high reproducibility and accuracy, which the workbench must meet to gain adoption among researchers.
en.title: Open-Source AI Workbench for Scientific Research

articles.title: rpamis/comet
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: Comet 是一个基于 AI 代理的项目，旨在帮助用户将抽象想法转化为结构化、可评估的工作流程。其核心价值在于通过自动化评估环节提升效率，适合需要快速验证与迭代的工作场景。该项目在 GitHub 上获得 2346 颗星，表明社区对其潜力有较高期待。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该项目可能面临需求模糊的问题，因为“将想法转化为工作流”的概念较宽泛，难以精准满足特定用户群体。部署路径依赖复杂的技术栈，对企业用户而言集成成本较高。同时，市场上已有类似低代码平台或 AI 工作流工具（如 LangChain），Comet 需差异化竞争。此外，评估环节的准确性和实用性若未有效验证，用户价值将大打折扣。
articles.highlight: 一个将想法转化为可评估工作流的代理技能工具，强调评估与自动化。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 2346 stars and recent public activity. Description: Comet: agent skill harness for turning ideas into evaluated workflows

zh.title: Comet: 将想法转化为可评估工作流的代理技能工具
zh.highlight: 一个将想法转化为可评估工作流的代理技能工具，强调评估与自动化。
zh.summary: Comet 是一个基于 AI 代理的项目，旨在帮助用户将抽象想法转化为结构化、可评估的工作流程。其核心价值在于通过自动化评估环节提升效率，适合需要快速验证与迭代的工作场景。该项目在 GitHub 上获得 2346 颗星，表明社区对其潜力有较高期待。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该项目可能面临需求模糊的问题，因为“将想法转化为工作流”的概念较宽泛，难以精准满足特定用户群体。部署路径依赖复杂的技术栈，对企业用户而言集成成本较高。同时，市场上已有类似低代码平台或 AI 工作流工具（如 LangChain），Comet 需差异化竞争。此外，评估环节的准确性和实用性若未有效验证，用户价值将大打折扣。

en.highlight: An agent skill harness for turning ideas into evaluated workflows, emphasizing evaluation and automation.
en.summary: Comet is an AI agent project designed to help users transform abstract ideas into structured, evaluable workflows. Its core value lies in improving efficiency through automated evaluation, suitable for scenarios requiring rapid validation and iteration. With 2,346 stars on GitHub, the project has garnered significant community interest.
en.failureAnalysis: Potential failure may stem from vague demand, as 'turning ideas into workflows' is broad and hard to target specific users. Deployment requires complex tech stacks, raising integration costs for enterprises. It also faces competition from low-code platforms and AI workflow tools like LangChain, and must prove the accuracy and practicality of its evaluation component.
en.title: Comet: Agent Skill Harness for Turning Ideas into Evaluated Workflows
